hero.title: Premium UV Plastic Coating & Vacuum Metalizing — Built for Consistency.
hero.description: PT. Starpack Indahmaju delivers UV plastic coating with advanced production control, stable output, and a wide range of premium coating effects. Designed to help your products stand out.

about.title: About Starpack
about.description: Established in January 1996 and headquartered in Jakarta, PT. Starpack Indahmaju supports manufacturing teams with reliable UV plastic coating production.

focus.title: What we focus on
focus.text: We specialize in plastic coating to help products achieve premium surface finishing and consistent appearance.
items: Wide coating effect options for different product requirements
Process stability supported by structured production control
Built for production scale and recurring orders

tech.title: Advanced Technology & Machinery
tech.description: Our manufacturing environment is designed for precision coating, stable operation, and consistent product results.

items.text: Capabilities built for recurring orders and high-volume manufacturing.
